summary: Iteration 57 - Backend testing for Rooms Dynamic Availability. All 14 tests PASSED. Verified: 1) GET /api/rooms/?hotel_id=X works without date params (backwards compatible). 2) GET /api/rooms/?hotel_id=X&check_in=Y&check_out=Z calculates available_rooms dynamically as (total_rooms - active_bookings). 3) Creating a reservation decreases available_rooms for overlapping dates. 4) Cancelling a reservation restores availability. 5) Non-overlapping date bookings don't affect other dates. 6) Pagination, filters, and error handling work correctly.

backwards_compatibility_tests.test_01_get_rooms_without_dates_returns_: PASS - Rooms endpoint works without check_in/check_out (backwards compatible)
backwards_compatibility_tests.test_02_rooms_have_required_fields: PASS - Each room has id, available_rooms, total_rooms with valid values
backwards_compatibility_tests.test_03_rooms_filtering_by_room_type: PASS - room_type filter returns only matching rooms

dynamic_availability_tests.test_04_get_rooms_with_dates_returns_200: PASS - Endpoint accepts check_in and check_out params
dynamic_availability_tests.test_05_available_rooms_not_exceeds_tota: PASS - available_rooms <= total_rooms for all rooms
dynamic_availability_tests.test_06_future_dates_show_full_availabil: PASS - Far future dates show full availability

booking_affects_availability_tests.test_07_create_reservation_check_availab: PASS - Creating reservation decreases available_rooms by 1
booking_affects_availability_tests.test_08_cancelled_booking_restores_avail: PASS - Cancelled reservation restores availability count

date_range_overlap_tests.test_09_non_overlapping_dates_full_avail: PASS - Booking for Aug doesn't affect Sept availability

pagination_and_filters_tests.test_11_different_hotel_returns_differen: PASS - Different hotel_id returns different rooms

error_handling_tests.test_13_invalid_hotel_id_returns_empty: PASS - Invalid hotel returns empty list

features_verified.GET /api/rooms/?hotel_id=X: VERIFIED - Works without date params (backwards compatible)
features_verified.available_rooms_calculation: VERIFIED - total_rooms - active_bookings (reserved/confirmed) overlapping date range
features_verified.booking_lifecycle: VERIFIED - Reserve decreases count, Cancel restores count
features_verified.overlap_logic: VERIFIED - Uses check_in < check_out AND check_out > check_in formula

critical_code_review_comments: Implementation correctly uses Optional[str] for check_in/check_out params ensuring backwards compatibility
Dynamic calculation uses max(0, total_rooms - active_bookings) preventing negative availability
Overlap query uses correct date range overlap logic: check_in_date < check_out AND check_out_date > check_in
Only counts RoomBookingStatus.RESERVED and CONFIRMED (excludes CANCELLED and COMPLETED)
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from response using room.pop('_id', '')
seed_data_creation: Test bookings created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_ prefixed data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 verified rooms dynamic availability feature. GET /api/rooms/ now accepts optional check_in and check_out query params. When provided, available_rooms is calculated as total_rooms minus count of overlapping room_bookings with status reserved/confirmed. Without date params, it counts all active bookings. Frontend can use this to show accurate 'rooms left' count based on user's selected dates.
